title: stelis scutellifera
intro: Stelis scutellifera, also known as the Plateau Antillean Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the Caribbean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis scutellifera include relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular natural remedy in herbal medicine. Stelis scutellifera is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in poultices and compresses to aid in the healing process.
